context: Tests whether the agent correctly verifies CLI prerequisites, handles the case where the CLI is absent or outdated, avoids auto-installing software, and handles error conditions including auth failures and Node.js version requirements.

checklist.name: Version check command
checklist.description: Uses `which short && short --version` (or an equivalent two-step command) to check for the CLI and its version

checklist.name: No auto-install
checklist.description: Does NOT automatically run any install command (e.g., brew install, npm install) when the CLI is missing; only shows installation instructions

checklist.name: Upgrade command accuracy
checklist.description: When version < 5.0.0, provides BOTH the brew upgrade command (`brew upgrade shortcut-cli`) AND the npm update command (`npm update -g @shortcut-cli/shortcut-cli`)

checklist.name: Stop after missing CLI
checklist.description: When CLI is not found, the documented flow STOPS after showing installation instructions rather than attempting to continue with Shortcut operations

checklist.name: Auth failure guidance
checklist.description: For an 'unauthorized' or 'invalid token' error, directs the user to run `short install` (not other commands like `short auth` or `short login`)

checklist.name: Not-found ID handling
checklist.description: When a story/epic returns 'not found', the response both confirms the ID used AND suggests using search to find the item

checklist.name: Node.js version requirement
checklist.description: ESM/import errors or 'unsupported engine' output is attributed to Node.js version and the response states Node.js >= 20.19.0 is required

checklist.name: Network error guidance
checklist.description: A timeout or connection error results in guidance to check the network connection (not to retry automatically)

checklist.name: Prerequisite check before operation
checklist.description: The script/plan checks prerequisites BEFORE attempting any Shortcut data operation

checklist.name: Minimum Node version stated
checklist.description: Installation instructions include the minimum Node.js version requirement (20.19.0)

checklist.name: Homebrew install shown
checklist.description: Installation instructions include the Homebrew option (`brew install shortcut-cli`)
